items.title: Why Is NVO Stock Falling Pre-Market Today?

items.title: Opendoor Headcount Falls About 25% From September As AI Pivot Accelerates
items.description: Opendoor is pivoting towards AI-based products and services. It had laid off workers in each of the last three years.
